ul.li: Memory Layout: BinaryStream implements a circular buffer strategy if the 2MB slab is exhausted.
Cache Locality: RegisterManager and BinaryStream metadata are cache-line aligned (64B).
Register Spill: When availability_mask == 0, RegisterManager triggers spill to [RSP + offset].
Relocations: Fixups are resolved in-place by BinaryLinker using the RelocationTable.

p.em: Fields in RegisterManager & BinaryStream are padded to prevent false sharing between thread-local emitter instances.
